def positive_handler_or_view_builds_raw_sql():
    rule_id = "handler_or_view_builds_raw_sql"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Route handler or view constructs a raw SQL string instead of delegating to a repository layer."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
